claim_boundary: Native q2 location phylo ML has one mean-mean correlation target; it is not q4 location-scale support.
next_gate: Use q2 evidence only for q2 rows.

claim_boundary: Corpair regression is q2 location-correlation evidence and does not imply q4 or scale-axis support.
next_gate: Keep corpair target status separate from q4 derived correlations.

claim_boundary: Native bivariate phylo REML is not promoted by q2 ML tests or Julia q4 REML rows.
next_gate: Design native estimator before changing status.

claim_boundary: Native q4 ML fits a four-axis block, but q4 correlations are derived and have no interval coverage.
next_gate: Keep SD direct-ready targets separate from derived correlations.

claim_boundary: Block-diagonal labels create two q2 blocks, not one full q4 unstructured covariance.
next_gate: Do not count block-diagonal evidence as full q4 support.

claim_boundary: Native TMB q4 REML remains unsupported and q4 Patterson-Thompson is not HSquared AI-REML.
next_gate: Keep unsupported until native restricted-likelihood design exists.

claim_boundary: Julia q4 REML bridge evidence is experimental and does not promote native TMB REML or public bridge support.
next_gate: Require native R direct DRM.jl and R-via-Julia parity before promotion.
